Module com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida
Package com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida.model.game

Interface IGame

All Known Implementing Classes:
Game
public interface IGame
Interface defining the core game logic contract for the Escritura Rapida typing game. Provides methods for level management, word validation, time control, and win/lose condition checking.
Since:
1.0
Version:
1.0
Author:
Juan JosÃ© Morera GÃ³mez
See Also:
  • Game

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    checkAnswer(String userWord)
    Validates the player's answer against the current word.
    void
    decrementTime()
    Decrements the remaining time by one second.
    int
    getLevel()
    Returns the current level of the game.
    int
    getTimeLeft()
    Returns the remaining time for the current level in seconds.
    boolean
    isGameOver()
    Returns whether the game has ended in a loss.
    boolean
    isGameWon()
    Checks whether the player has won the game.
    boolean
    isTimeUp()
    Checks whether the countdown timer has reached zero.
    boolean
    onTimeUp(String userWord)
    Performs the final word validation when the timer reaches zero.
    String
    startLevel()
    Starts the current level by initializing the timer and generating a new word for the player to type.

  • Method Details

    • startLevel

      String startLevel()
      Starts the current level by initializing the timer and generating a new word for the player to type.
      Returns:
      the word the player must type in this level
      Since:
      1.0

    • isGameWon

      boolean isGameWon()
      Checks whether the player has won the game.
      Returns:
      true if the player has won, false otherwise
      Since:
      1.0

    • checkAnswer

      boolean checkAnswer(String userWord)
      Validates the player's answer against the current word. If correct, advances the game to the next level.
      Parameters:
      userWord - the word typed by the player
      Returns:
      true if the answer is correct, false otherwise
      Since:
      1.0

    • getLevel

      int getLevel()
      Returns the current level of the game.
      Returns:
      the current level
      Since:
      1.0

    • getTimeLeft

      int getTimeLeft()
      Returns the remaining time for the current level in seconds.
      Returns:
      the time left in seconds
      Since:
      1.0

    • isGameOver

      boolean isGameOver()
      Returns whether the game has ended in a loss.
      Returns:
      true if the game is over, false otherwise
      Since:
      1.0

    • decrementTime

      void decrementTime()
      Decrements the remaining time by one second.
      Since:
      1.0

    • isTimeUp

      boolean isTimeUp()
      Checks whether the countdown timer has reached zero.
      Returns:
      true if time is up, false otherwise
      Since:
      1.0

    • onTimeUp

      boolean onTimeUp(String userWord)
      Performs the final word validation when the timer reaches zero. If correct, advances to the next level. If incorrect, ends the game.
      Parameters:
      userWord - the word typed by the player at the moment time ran out
      Returns:
      true if the word was correct and the player is saved, false if the word was incorrect and the game is over
      Since:
      1.0
